nasb.text: Fear came on all those living around them; and all these matters were being talked about in all the hill country of Judea.

esv.text: And fear came on all their neighbors. And all these things were talked about through all the hill country of Judea,

cnv.text: 住在周圍的人都害怕，這一切事傳遍了整個猶太山地，

ccb.text: 住在周围的人都很惧怕，这消息很快就传遍了整个犹太山区。

csbs.text: 于是住在他们周围的人都感到惧怕，整个犹太山区的人也都在谈论这一切事。
